data.title: 'Not Eating Gummies!' Says Kamala Harris About How She Copes With Election Stress As Polls Tighten Against Donald Trump
data.description: Kamala Harris denies using cannabis edibles to cope with election stress, stating she works out instead. Anxiety reported, but still leads Black voters according to polls.

data.title: McDonald's 'Well Positioned To Contain' E. Coli Outbreak: Analysts Say Impact Minimal Compared To Chipotle's 2015 Case
data.description: Analysts predict a minimal impact to McDonald's financials and stock price after the recent E. coli outbreak.

data.title: A Preview Of Hilltop Hldgs's Earnings
3 Regional Bank Stock Picks From JPMorgan: Analyst 'Encouraged' After Solid Q3
data.description: US regional banks resilient in Q3, with strong earnings, expected rate cuts, easing credit concerns, and underweight positioning driving upside potential.

data.title: Crypto On The Ballot? Nope, Even Young Male Voters Prioritize Inflation, Jobs And The Economy
data.description: Crypto remains low priority for male voters, despite its rise in financial markets. Young men prioritize traditional issues like inflation and jobs.
